title: Death Cap Mushroom Gapples
description: Resource Pack that changes golden apples into death cap mushrooms. This does not effect enchanted golden apples.
body:
Golden apples are transformed into a lovely, 3D, Death Cap Mushroom, the textures taken from Minecraft Dungeons. It looks nice in your inventory, hand, and in F5. Just a fun little pack for those who like Minecraft Dungeons. Does not effect enchanted golden apples.
Feel free to use in a modpack.
